title: [Let's Do] Candlelight - Farm&Charm compat
description: Welcome to Candlelight! This version was made for improved compat with [Let's Do] Farm & Charm
body:
![Candlelight](https://lets-do.ch/assets/mod-logos/candlelight.png)

Elegant Evenings & Refined Feasts

The sophisticated extension to Farm & Charm


"Set the table. Light the candles."


Ever dreamed of the perfect dinner in Minecraft? Candlelight provides everything you need to create refined meals, elegant tables and memorable evenings.
This version offers improved compatibility with [Let's Do] Farm & Charm, featuring additional items, refined recipes and expanded mechanics.
## A New Way to Dine
- Large meals cooked in a Frying Pan or Cooking Pot - Multi-stage food system allowing you to eat meals piece by piece - Placeable dishes and plates that grant additional hunger and saturation bonuses - The option to both place and consume your creations
Fine dining takes time.
## Cooking with Effects
- Infuse meals with Potion effects - Transfer powerful bonuses into your dishes - Experiment with ingredients for unique culinary results
Flavor meets function.
## Atmosphere & Details
- Typewriter and envelopes for elegant storytelling - Decorative dinnerware and table settings - A cosmetic armor set made purely for style - Additional immersive decor elements

Prepare the feast.

Light the candles.

Enjoy the evening.


Enjoy your new meals and bon appétit!


Requires [Let's Do] Farm & Charm


Dedicated to MissLilitu


# The Let’s Do Collection

# Support & Community

Let’s Do grows through its community.


GitHub • Discord • Patreon
